2605.25765.title: Concept Unlearning via Cross-Attention Activation Projection for Diffusion Models
2605.25765.paper_summary: Concept unlearning aims to erase a target concept from a pretrained text-to-image diffusion model without retraining. Closed-form methods are attractive in this setting because they apply a single deterministic edit to the cross-attention weights and add no inference-time cost. Existing closed-form methods, however, represent the target concept through the text encoder's response to a few short anchor prompts that name it, and paraphrased prompts that evoke the concept without naming it consistently bypass the edit. We argue that the target should instead be represented in the cross-attention activation space. Text embeddings describe the user's prompt, while cross-attention activations describe what the model is about to render, and the latter generalize to paraphrase the anchor templates do not cover. Building on this observation, we propose PURE (Projection in U-Net Rendering for Erasure), a closed-form method that builds the forget and retain bases from per-layer cross-attention activations captured along a short denoising trajectory and applies a single linear projector to the cross-attention key and value weights. On a recent holistic concept-unlearning benchmark covering ten concepts across artistic style, intellectual property, celebrity, and NSFW categories, PURE significantly reduces target leakage under paraphrased and adversarial prompts while preserving retain concepts close to the unedited model, yielding the best overall forget-retain trade-off among evaluated methods.
2605.25765.paper_summary_zh: 概念遺忘旨在從預訓練的文本到圖像擴散模型中抹去目標概念，而無需重新訓練。封閉形式的方法在這種情況下很有吸引力，因為它們對交叉注意力權重應用單一確定性編輯，並且不增加推理時間成本。然而，現有的封閉形式方法通過文本編碼器對幾個簡短的錨點提示的反應來表示目標概念，而改寫的提示則在不命名的情況下引發該概念，這樣的提示通常會繞過編輯。我們認為，目標應該在交叉注意力激活空間中表示。文本嵌入描述用戶的提示，而交叉注意力激活描述模型即將渲染的內容，後者能夠概括改寫的錨點模板所未涵蓋的內容。基於這一觀察，我們提出了PURE（Projection in U-Net Rendering for Erasure），這是一種封閉形式的方法，從沿著短的去噪軌跡捕獲的每層交叉注意力激活中構建遺忘和保留基礎，並對交叉注意力鍵和值權重應用單一線性投影器。在最近涵蓋藝術風格、知識產權、名人和NSFW類別的十個概念的整體概念遺忘基準上，PURE在改寫和對抗提示下顯著減少了目標洩漏，同時保留了接近未編輯模型的保留概念，在評估的方法中實現了最佳的遺忘-保留權衡。
2605.25765.author: Saemi Moon et.al.
2605.25765.authors: Saemi Moon, Suhyeon Jun, Seoyeon Lee, Dongwoo Kim
